query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS partnerAlerts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  partnerId INT NOT NULL,
  alertType VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  body TEXT NOT NULL,
  severity ENUM('info', 'warning', 'success', 'milestone') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
  isRead TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  isDismissed TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  metadata JSON NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_partnerId (partnerId),
  INDEX idx_alertType (alertType),
  INDEX idx_isRead (isRead)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS partnerAlerts (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  partnerId INT NOT NULL,
  alertType VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  body TEXT NOT NULL,
  severity ENUM('info', 'warning', 'success', 'milestone') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
  isRead TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  isDismissed TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  metadata JSON NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_partnerId (partnerId),
  INDEX idx_alertType (alertType),
  INDEX idx_isRead (isRead)
);
